text: Billions of microbes call your skin home. Are they friends or foes? Your skin is a vibrant ecosystem. Most microbes are beneficial, but some can cause trouble. These microbes help protect you, but they can also react to harsh products. Studies suggest a balanced microbiome can improve skin health. But remember, research is ongoing. So, less is often more. Choose products wisely to support your skin's ecosystem. Curious about your skin's health? Follow for more science-based insights!
